description: Expanded end-to-end AI conversation regression suite for Spartan Shield-Saver. Each full lifecycle scenario exercises event creation, event editing, budget constraints, catering, dietary filters, venue affordability, starter tasks, custom task add/edit/complete/delete, agenda add/edit/delete, and event summary.
